tasarruf.title: Savings
tasarruf.subtitle: Saving Suggestions and Posts
tasarruf.noPostsDescription: Be the first to share your savings! A small step can make a big difference.
tasarruf.achievementPlaceholder: E.g., I collected 191 bottles and recycled them...
tasarruf.selectSavingTypeSubtitle: Choose the type that best fits your savings
tasarruf.shareTextHint: You can edit the text as you wish.
tasarruf.doaDescription: Find refund points and contribute to your budget by recycling.
tasarruf.subcenterDescription: Track unnecessary subscriptions, cancel easily, and reduce monthly expenses.
tasarruf.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this post?

coffee_skipped.label: Did not buy coffee
coffee_skipped.description: Made coffee at home or skipped it instead of buying from outside.

primaryMetric.label: How many coffees did you skip?

coffee_skipped.postTemplate: I skipped {count} coffee, kept {amountSaved} TL in my pocket.
coffee_skipped.shareTitle: Kept my coffee money in my pocket today

tea_skipped.label: Did not buy tea
tea_skipped.description: Brought tea from home or used tea bags instead of buying tea from outside.

primaryMetric.label: How many teas did you skip?

tea_skipped.postTemplate: I skipped {count} tea, kept {amountSaved} TL in my pocket.

food_delivery_skipped.label: Did not order food
food_delivery_skipped.description: Cooked at home instead of ordering food delivery.
food_delivery_skipped.postTemplate: I skipped ordering food for {mealCount} meals, saved {amountSaved} TL.
food_delivery_skipped.shareTitle: Did not order food delivery today

lunch_from_home.label: Brought lunch from home
lunch_from_home.description: Brought lunch from home instead of buying food at school/office.
lunch_from_home.postTemplate: I brought lunch from home for {dayCount} days, saved {amountSaved} TL.
lunch_from_home.shareTitle: Saved money by bringing lunch from home

water_bottle_refill.label: Did not buy bottled water
water_bottle_refill.description: Used a reusable bottle instead of buying bottled water outside.

primaryMetric.label: How many bottles of water did you skip?

water_bottle_refill.postTemplate: I skipped {bottleCount} bottles of water, saved {amountSaved} TL.

bottle_return.label: Recycled bottles/cans
bottle_return.description: Returned accumulated bottles or cans to a recycle point.

scrap_sold.label: Sold scrap/recyclables
scrap_sold.description: Sold metal, paper, plastic, or electronics scraps from home.
scrap_sold.postTemplate: I sold {weight} kg of recyclables, earned {amountEarned} TL.

unused_item_sold.label: Sold unused item
unused_item_sold.description: Sold an unused item lying around the house.

second_hand_bought.label: Bought second-hand
second_hand_bought.description: Bought a second-hand item instead of buying new to spend less.
second_hand_bought.postTemplate: Bought second-hand {itemName}, saved {amountSaved} TL compared to new.

discount_used.label: Used discount/coupon
discount_used.description: Used a discount or coupon on a purchase to pay less.

taxi_skipped.label: Did not take a taxi
taxi_skipped.description: Used public transport, walked, or chose another option instead of a taxi.
taxi_skipped.postTemplate: Skipped taking a taxi {tripCount} times, saved {amountSaved} TL.
taxi_skipped.shareTitle: Kept taxi fare in my pocket

walked_instead.label: Walked instead
walked_instead.description: Walked short distances instead of using a vehicle or taxi.

public_transport_used.label: Used public transport
public_transport_used.description: Used public transport instead of driving or taking a taxi.
public_transport_used.postTemplate: Used public transport for {tripCount} trips, saved {amountSaved} TL.

carpool.label: Carpooled
carpool.description: Shared travel costs with friends instead of going alone.
carpool.postTemplate: Shared travel with {peopleCount} people, saved {amountSaved} TL.

subscription_cancelled.label: Cancelled subscription
subscription_cancelled.postTemplate: Cancelled my {subscriptionName} subscription, will keep {monthlySaved} TL in my pocket monthly.

student_plan_used.label: Switched to student/family plan
student_plan_used.description: Switched to student, family or cheaper plan instead of normal plan.
student_plan_used.postTemplate: Switched to a cheaper plan for {serviceName}, will save {monthlySaved} TL monthly.

home_grown_onion.label: Grew green onions
home_grown_onion.description: Grew my own green onions at home instead of buying from the market.
home_grown_onion.postTemplate: Grew {count} bunches of green onions at home, saved {amountSaved} TL.

home_grown_herbs.label: Grew herbs
home_grown_herbs.description: Grew greens like mint, basil, or parsley at home.
home_grown_herbs.postTemplate: Grew {count} herbs at home, saved {amountSaved} TL.

reusable_bag_used.label: Did not buy plastic bags
reusable_bag_used.description: Brought a cloth bag or net from home instead of buying plastic bags.

primaryMetric.label: How many plastic bags did you skip?

reusable_bag_used.postTemplate: Skipped buying {bagCount} plastic bags, saved {amountSaved} TL using a reusable bag.
reusable_bag_used.shareTitle: Protected nature and my wallet by using reusable bags

bulk_buying.label: Bought in bulk
bulk_buying.description: Bought in bulk instead of buying one by one to lower unit price.
bulk_buying.shareTitle: Paid less by buying in bulk

home_repair.label: Repaired it myself
home_repair.description: Fixed a simple repair myself without calling service/repairman.

leftovers_used.label: Ate leftovers
leftovers_used.description: Used leftover food in a new meal instead of throwing it away.
leftovers_used.postTemplate: Ate leftovers for {mealCount} meals, saved {amountSaved} TL.
